title: collinia humilis
intro: Collinia humilis, also known as the dwarf collinia or yellow arum, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Arum. It is native to the tropical regions of Australia and New Guinea. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Collinia humilis include reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and providing relief from respiratory issues, and it can be prepared into herbal preparations such as infusions, decoctions, and tinctures.
intro_study: According to "Plants (Basel, Switzerland)", Collinia humilis benefits include improved plant growth and essential oil production due to its application of humic acid, which can be considered a plant biostimulant.
